name: Fake Overpayment Refund Scam
description: Scammer claims to have overpaid and requests a refund via an off-platform channel

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: I'm a buyer looking for a long-term relationship. I sent you a test payment of $1,500 via Fiverr but I accidentally paid too much.

conversation.speaker: target
conversation.message: I haven't received any payment yet actually.

conversation.speaker: scammer
conversation.message: Can you please refund the extra $800 to my PayPal before I release the rest of the contract? It takes time to show in your account.
